title: [FULL] FishCraft 2 Season
description:
Mod pack for Minecraft server. 
189 CLIENT mods
body:
# FishCraft Server ModPack

![FishCraft MP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/077daf87ab3f4e53e01ec61d58a433c0d065bd9e.png)
___________________________________________
**ALLOCATE 5 GB OF RAM TO THE GAME**
___________________________________________
- There are 184+ mods inside.
- All mods are exclusively client-side. You can play on any servers with this modpacks
- The author of the assembly is WhiteMeovv
> The build is updated regularly.
> In case of problems, contact the personal message discord
________
**IMPORTANT INFORMATION**
###  There are texture packs and shaders inside the modpack. You can disable them before starting the game, they are not a mandatory part.
# Other
- [Discord WhiteMeovv](https://discord.com/users/286530920587067393)
- [FishCraft WebSite](https://fishcraftserver.tilda.ws/)
________________
